evidence_summary: Round189 R5 Loop-12 Korea consumer/retail/brand case for K_FOOD_GLOBAL_LOCALIZATION; calibration-only and focused on overseas channel, localization, sell-through, reorder, inventory/receivables, OPM/FCF, tariff/regulation/CAPEX risk, and price path.
notes: CJ has Stage 2 localization evidence; Stage 3 waits for utilization, ASP, OPM, FCF, and repeat channel evidence. Sources: round_189.md CJ Group / Schwan's / local plants.

company_name: 오리온 global staple brand second wave
evidence_summary: Round189 R5 Loop-12 Korea consumer/retail/brand case for K_FOOD_GLOBAL_STAPLE_BRAND_SECOND_WAVE; calibration-only and focused on overseas channel, localization, sell-through, reorder, inventory/receivables, OPM/FCF, tariff/regulation/CAPEX risk, and price path.
notes: Orion is a quiet R5 Stage 2~3 candidate, but regional growth, OPM, input costs, and price path must be backfilled. Sources: round_189.md Orion / Choco Pie global staple brand.

evidence_summary: Round189 R5 Loop-12 Korea consumer/retail/brand case for K_FOOD_SINGLE_SKU_EXPORT_RISK; calibration-only and focused on overseas channel, localization, sell-through, reorder, inventory/receivables, OPM/FCF, tariff/regulation/CAPEX risk, and price path.
notes: Single SKU export can route Layer 1/Stage 2 watch, but Green waits for multi-SKU reorder, OPM, and inventory quality. Sources: round_189.md single SKU K-food risk.

evidence_summary: Round189 R5 Loop-12 Korea consumer/retail/brand case for ECOMMERCE_RESTRUCTURING_JV_KOREA; calibration-only and focused on overseas channel, localization, sell-through, reorder, inventory/receivables, OPM/FCF, tariff/regulation/CAPEX risk, and price path.
notes: E-Mart/Shinsegae JV has Stage 2 catalyst and price reaction, but data restriction and monetization proof gate Stage 3. Sources: round_189.md Reuters Shinsegae Alibaba JV, round_189.md WSJ E-Mart +5.5%, round_189.md Reuters KFTC conditional approval.

evidence_summary: Round189 R5 Loop-12 Korea consumer/retail/brand case for K_BEAUTY_BRAND_SECOND_WAVE; calibration-only and focused on overseas channel, localization, sell-through, reorder, inventory/receivables, OPM/FCF, tariff/regulation/CAPEX risk, and price path.
notes: K-beauty brand second wave is a Stage 2~3 candidate basket only with sell-through, reorder, inventory, and OPM evidence. Sources: round_189.md Reuters K-beauty US import / online growth, round_189.md Clio TonyMoly brand references.

evidence_summary: Round189 R5 Loop-12 Korea consumer/retail/brand case for CONVENIENCE_STORE_PB_SSSG_KOREA; calibration-only and focused on overseas channel, localization, sell-through, reorder, inventory/receivables, OPM/FCF, tariff/regulation/CAPEX risk, and price path.
notes: Convenience-store Stage 3 needs SSSG, PB mix, franchise margin, OPM, FCF, and price-path validation. Sources: round_189.md GS25 store network / convenience store gates.

evidence_summary: Round189 R5 Loop-12 Korea consumer/retail/brand case for DEPARTMENT_STORE_MALL_REDEVELOPMENT; calibration-only and focused on overseas channel, localization, sell-through, reorder, inventory/receivables, OPM/FCF, tariff/regulation/CAPEX risk, and price path.
notes: Mall redevelopment is a Stage 1~2 option, but CAPEX payback, traffic, lease income, OPM, and FCF gate Stage 3. Sources: round_189.md Lotte Department Store mall investment.

evidence_summary: Round189 R5 Loop-12 Korea consumer/retail/brand case for K_BEAUTY_TARIFF_IMPORT_REVIEW; calibration-only and focused on overseas channel, localization, sell-through, reorder, inventory/receivables, OPM/FCF, tariff/regulation/CAPEX risk, and price path.
notes: U.S. import growth is Stage 2 context, but tariff and margin-buffer uncertainty create 4C-watch until price pass-through is proven. Sources: round_189.md AP K-beauty tariff threat.

company_name: K-beauty online viral without physical sell-through
evidence_summary: Round189 R5 Loop-12 Korea consumer/retail/brand case for CHANNEL_STUFFING_INVENTORY_OVERLAY; calibration-only and focused on overseas channel, localization, sell-through, reorder, inventory/receivables, OPM/FCF, tariff/regulation/CAPEX risk, and price path.
notes: Online viral growth can become 4B-watch when physical sell-through and reorder are not verified. Sources: round_189.md Reuters physical store sell-through warning.

company_name: E-Mart / Shinsegae Alibaba JV data-regulation cap
evidence_summary: Round189 R5 Loop-12 Korea consumer/retail/brand case for RETAIL_PLATFORM_DATA_REGULATION_OVERLAY; calibration-only and focused on overseas channel, localization, sell-through, reorder, inventory/receivables, OPM/FCF, tariff/regulation/CAPEX risk, and price path.
notes: The JV can be Stage 2, but data-sharing restrictions can cap monetization and block Stage 3. Sources: round_189.md Reuters KFTC data-sharing restriction.

evidence_summary: Round189 R5 Loop-12 Korea consumer/retail/brand case for K_FOOD_GLOBAL_LOCALIZATION; calibration-only and focused on overseas channel, localization, sell-through, reorder, inventory/receivables, OPM/FCF, tariff/regulation/CAPEX risk, and price path.
notes: Local plants are assets and costs; without utilization, OPM, and FCF, localization stays capped. Sources: round_189.md CJ localization capex drag rule.

company_name: Orion global staple brand maturity cap
evidence_summary: Round189 R5 Loop-12 Korea consumer/retail/brand case for K_FOOD_GLOBAL_STAPLE_BRAND_SECOND_WAVE; calibration-only and focused on overseas channel, localization, sell-through, reorder, inventory/receivables, OPM/FCF, tariff/regulation/CAPEX risk, and price path.
notes: A global staple brand can still be capped when mature-market growth, input costs, or regional risk prevents OP/EPS expansion. Sources: round_189.md Orion regional maturity cap.

evidence_summary: Round189 R5 Loop-12 Korea consumer/retail/brand case for CONVENIENCE_STORE_PB_SSSG_KOREA; calibration-only and focused on overseas channel, localization, sell-through, reorder, inventory/receivables, OPM/FCF, tariff/regulation/CAPEX risk, and price path.
notes: Convenience-store scale is not Stage 3 if wage, rent, electricity, franchise margin, and OPM deteriorate. Sources: round_189.md convenience store cost pressure.

company_name: R5 Loop 12 consumer / channel detail confidence reference
evidence_summary: Round189 R5 Loop-12 Korea consumer/retail/brand case for DISCLOSURE_CONFIDENCE_CAP; calibration-only and focused on overseas channel, localization, sell-through, reorder, inventory/receivables, OPM/FCF, tariff/regulation/CAPEX risk, and price path.
false_positive_reason: opendart_list_only; media_report_only; channel_missing; inventory_missing; opm_unknown; fcf_unknown
notes: R5 Loop 12 requires detail fetch and forbids invented missing sales, channel, inventory, OPM, FCF, sell-through, and stage price fields. Sources: round_189.md disclosure confidence rule.
